title: Mapper Base
description: A simple library mod that includes all common content shared by my other mods
body:
# What is Mapper Base?

Mapper Base is a library mod that provides basic elements and functionalities to my other mods. It's literally named after my nickname, nothing more.

For players, the only notable addition is steel. Everything else is just code under the hood used by EmbellishCraft and Road Stuff.

Mapper Base is currently available for Minecraft 1.21.1. There is currently no active development so 1.19.3+ versions are not planned for now.

Special thanks to Karrade_ for updating the mod to 1.18.2 and 1.19.2 and McJty for the 1.20 version.

This mod is only intended to work with Forge for 1.20 and older, and NeoForge starting from 1.21. Fabric is not supported neither planned at this time, and Forge is now deprecated.
